deferred.reason: Server rotation and hardware-proof enforcement were outside mobile scope.
Need server ID uniqueness and a two-contour SQLite fixture.
Ignored local signing files require deployment/ACL proof.
No native SQLite/Android E2E harness was run.

explicitExclusions.reason: Ignored/generated build copies are not included by official build-apk.ps1.
Third-party dependency installation tree; behavior assessed through manifests and tests.

openQuestions.followUpPrompt: Require TLS/VPN/pinning unless the network trust boundary is explicit.
openQuestions.question: Does the deployed local-enterprise Wi-Fi count as trusted, or must tokens be protected against any same-LAN observer?

openQuestions.followUpPrompt: Run a two-contour fixture and enforce composite contour keys locally.
openQuestions.question: Are assignment/task/point IDs globally unique across contours on the server?

surfaces.label: Authentication, refresh and offline session
surfaces.notes: Client hardware proof and server rotation remain unverified.

surfaces.label: Media preparation, storage and upload

surfaces.label: SQLite contour isolation and query correctness
surfaces.notes: SQL arity is reportable; contour schema/key collision needs two-contour runtime proof.

surfaces.label: Outbox, idempotency and response validation
surfaces.notes: Current source validates responses and owner/contour applies; stale generated copies suppressed.

surfaces.label: Generated and ignored build copies
surfaces.notes: Official build excludes .tmp; generated candidates were suppressed.

surfaces.notes: 57 tests, encoding, typecheck and lint pass; native SQLite/E2E gaps remain.
